decision-tree.root-question: Does the program have >=3 teams AND >=1 surprise blocker per month AND a chosen graph-storage format?

branch.when: teams_count >= 3 AND surprise_blockers_per_month >= 1 AND graph_storage_chosen == true
branch.conclusion: Build the graph end-to-end: typed edges + graph-as-code + weekly refresh + standard queries + PR-style updates.
Pick a storage format first (Mermaid+Markdown for <50 nodes, DOT+Graphviz for visual review, JSON for tool-backed). Do not start before format is fixed.
Skip the graph. Use sprint planning + dependency callouts instead — graph overhead exceeds value.
